title.en: Ye Tian received a summons, which was from Ouya...

content.en:
this day.

Ye Tian received a summons, which was from Ouyang Jiu'er.

"The Heavenly Emperor Palace wants to kill me?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Moreover, it was the half-step domain ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace who planned to assassinate him, and it was a number of half-step domain ancestors who shot together, and once they did, they would not give him a chance to live.

"Where did Jiu'er get the information?"

Ye Tian was curious.

All along, Ouyang Jiu'er seemed to know the Heavenly Emperor Palace very well, and even knew all the plans of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

And this time, the plan of the Heavenly Emperor Palace was obviously something that only the Half-Step Domain Ancestor knew, and Ouyang Jiu'er also knew about it.

"Jiu'er shouldn't be an intelligence officer at the half-step Domain Ancestor level in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, right?

Ye Tian was a little curious.

If the guess was true, then Ouyang Jiu'er's identity would not be ordinary, otherwise it would be impossible for the half-step domain ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace to reveal the information to Ouyang Jiu'er.

"The last time I exposed my combat power on the isolated island of the Forbidden Treasure Land, the Heavenly Emperor Palace should know that my combat power is second only to the half-step domain ancestor, if I launch an ambush, I will definitely be treated as a real half-step domain ancestor, and once I launch an attack, he will definitely kill me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although Black Wind Mountain is strong, it is impossible for the half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain to protect him at any time, and the strength of ordinary half-step domain ancestors is not strong, and they can't protect him, it must be a half-step domain ancestor like the Miaofa Dao Ancestor to be able to barely protect him.

And in fact, the Miaofa Dao Ancestor is not very powerful, at most he is half of the Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, once the Heavenly Emperor Palace sends out a real Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, the Mystic Law Dao Ancestor will not be able to protect him.

Therefore, he had to rely on himself, as long as he was strong enough, the Heavenly Emperor Palace would not dare to rashly attack him.

"We must raise our cultivation to the Invincible Dao Ancestor realm as soon as possible!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Now, his Endless Dao has reached the level of eighty-three percent, as long as he continues to work hard to comprehend and put all his energy on the Endless Dao, it is not difficult to raise the Endless Dao to the limit.

"The people of the Heavenly Emperor Palace think that if I want to be promoted to the Invincible Dao Ancestor realm, I'm afraid it will take a long time, but they don't know that Black Wind Mountain has an Eternal Source Stone Statue, and I have always been able to comprehend the Eternal Source Stone Statue, plus my talent is good enough, if I want to be promoted to an Invincible Dao Ancestor, it doesn't take a long time! Hmph, when I step into the Invincible Dao Ancestor level, if the half-step Domain Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace dares to attack me, they will be the ones who will suffer!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he spent most of his time in the Wind Mountain Eternal Source Stone Statue Meditation Tower.

He has a lot of points, plus countless resources, enough to redeem enough points to be able to comprehend the Eternal Source Stone Statue for a long time.

And just like that, year after year.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace has been staring at the situation of the human race, but Ye Tian can't come out at all, so they think that Ye Tian is in retreat, and they don't suspect anything, after all, it is normal for Dao ancestors to retreat.

In addition, Ye Tian also asked his relatives to retreat and cultivate, and try not to go out of the human world.

After all, Ye Tian was also afraid that the Heavenly Emperor Palace would deal with his relatives and thus lure him out.

Therefore, Ye Tian and his relatives are all in retreat, so that it will be safer.

In the case that Ye Tian was trying to improve the Endless Dao at all costs, his ascension speed was very fast, after all, he had temporarily given up other aspects of cultivation, and he could improve the Endless Dao by one percent in almost ten thousand years.

And just like that, ten thousand and ten thousand years passed.

More than 100,000 years have passed, and on this day, Ye Tian finally comprehended the Endless Dao to the limit level.

"It's finally time to break through!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Rumble!!!!!

The Endless Dao of the Extreme Level communicated the origin of the Chaos Dao, and Ye Tian's body and the Endless Dao and the Origin of the Chaos Dao of the Extreme Level seemed to be integrated, and the entire body attracted a huge transformation.

Click!!!

The shackles in the underworld were broken, and endless source power poured into Ye Tian's body, helping him to continuously change the essence of his physical body.

The supreme body is transforming into an extreme body at this moment, representing the limit of the Dao Ancestor, which is much stronger than the supreme body.

Moreover, the Dao power, soul, and physical strength of the Invincible Dao Ancestor far surpassed that of the Invincible Dao Ancestor, and only a few rare Absolute Dao Ancestors could be comparable to the weaker Invincible Dao Ancestor.

Under normal circumstances, an invincible Dao Ancestor could easily kill a supreme Dao Ancestor.

And Ye Tian broke through at this moment, his aura continued to grow, and the power of his body, soul, and forbidden dao power were all skyrocketing, as if he had broken through a big realm.

Because Ye Tian's background was too deep, it seemed that even the power of the Chaos Origin was too late for Ye Tian to complete the breakthrough.

Therefore, Ye Tian took out a large number of forbidden and strange things of cultivation, smashed these forbidden strange things, turned them into forbidden energy and poured into the inner world, and mobilized the power of the forbidden origin to complete the transformation of the body.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

One day!

Two days!

Three days!

......

Ye Tian's breakthrough status was in the human realm, so the outside world didn't know about it, and even Black Wind Mountain didn't know that he had broken through.

This breakthrough took six months and cost Ye Tian countless resources before he successfully completed the transformation.

"My strength ......"

Ye Tian felt it a little, and was immediately overjoyed.

He is now much, much stronger than before, and the whole person has ushered in a new qualitative change.

If Ye Tian, who is at the level of the strongest Dao Ancestor, is only comparable to a weaker half-step domain ancestor, then his current combat power is probably already above that of the Blue Dragon Palace Lord, and it may be comparable to a half-step domain ancestor like the Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Miaofa Dao Ancestor.

What's more, he has just broken through to an invincible Dao Ancestor, and there is still a lot of room for improvement.

When he cultivates the Nine Extremes Dao Palace, he will stabilize his cultivation, improve the power of the forbidden Dao, the power of the soul and the power of the body, and then improve the forbidden body and cultivate the Extreme Dao inheritance.

At that time, there will be a considerable increase in his strength.

At that time, even if his combat strength was not as good as the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, the gap was not very large.

In the following days, Ye Tian was very low-key, not publicizing his breakthrough, but honestly stabilizing his realm and improving his cultivation strength.

And just like that, another 10,000 years passed.

And after these 10,000 years of penance, Ye Tian's realm has long stabilized, and his cultivation has also increased slightly.

And because he broke through to the Invincible Dao Ancestor realm, Ye Tian's forbidden body has also grown, and now he has completed the tempering level of eighty percent and seven, if he continues to work hard, it will not be long before he can reach the tempering level of ninety.

In addition, his forbidden Dao techniques have basically been raised to the Dacheng realm.

"It's time to go out and lead the Heavenly Emperor Palace to do it!"

Ye Tian decided.

However, instead of going out of the main body, he copied his own body and went out as a copied body, so that even if the copied body was killed, it would have no effect on him.

This was the safest means, after all, he didn't know if the Heavenly Emperor Palace would kill him at all costs, in that case, even if it was the half-step domain ancestor combat power of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, it was not very safe.

There is only one life, so he is naturally more cautious.
